# terrible_community_general_scaleway_function (Data Source)





<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `host_id` (String) ID of the `terrible_host` to run this data source against
- `name` (String) Name of the function.
- `namespace_id` (String) Function namespace identifier.
- `region` (String) Scaleway region to use (for example `fr-par`).
- `runtime` (String) Runtime of the function. See https://www.scaleway.com/en/docs/compute/functions/reference-content/functions-lifecycle/ for all available runtimes.

### Optional

- `description` (String) Description of the function.
- `environment_variables` (String) Environment variables of the function. Injected in function at runtime.
- `function_timeout` (String) The length of time your handler can spend processing a request before being stopped.
- `handler` (String) The `module-name.export` value in your function.
- `max_scale` (Number) Maximum number of replicas for the function.
- `memory_limit` (Number) Resources define performance characteristics of your function. They are allocated to your function at runtime.
- `min_scale` (Number) Minimum number of replicas for the function.
- `privacy` (String) Privacy policies define whether a function can be executed anonymously. Choose `public` to enable anonymous execution, or `private` to protect your function with an authentication mechanism provided by the Scaleway API.
- `redeploy` (Boolean) Redeploy the function if update is required.
- `secret_environment_variables` (String) Secret environment variables of the function. Updating those values does not output a R`ignore:changed` state in Ansible. Injected in function at runtime.
- `state` (String) Indicate desired state of the function.

### Read-Only

- `function` (String) The function information.
